fields.acceptance_criteria: Tree toggle and tree file/document SVG icons render at intended 12-16px size across default workspace view and after filtering; regression test added.
fields.evidence_screenshot: User-provided chat screenshot (2026-03-21) showing oversized chevron and document SVG icons in left pane.
fields.expected_behavior: Tree icons remain compact and aligned to each row label.
fields.reproduction: Open ticket-viewer default workspace; left tree pane shows giant chevron/document icons taking large vertical space.
fields.status_note: Screenshot evidence added from user attachment.
fields.title: Bug: ticket-viewer tree SVG icons render at massive size
